ksa_text: Knowledge of AI cost-risk analysis and benefit assessment including financial impact evaluation of AI errors, benefit-risk trade-off analysis, cost-effectiveness evaluation, and economic impact measurement.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to Data Compliance Analyst scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("risk analys", "evaluat.{0,15} ?:ai|model|risk|bias"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in RSK job postings or cert curricula (CRISC, FRM, NIST AI RMF, CISM). Would a working Data Compliance Analyst self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the competency is implicit in Data Compliance Analyst work (domain affinity 0.75, 2 RSK signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching systematically underrepresents risk management and governance KSAs.
